scripts.build: cd ../core && npm install && npm run build && cd ../server && npm install && rm -rf dist && tsc --project tsconfig.json && mkdir -p dist/core && cp -r ../core/dist/* dist/core/ && npx tsc-alias && npm run debug-build
scripts.debug-build:
echo '
===== DEBUG: Server dist directory structure =====
' && ls -la dist && echo '
===== DEBUG: Core dist directory structure =====
' && ls -la ../core/dist && echo '
===== DEBUG: Server dist/core directory structure =====
' && ls -la dist/core && echo '
===== DEBUG: Sample config.js in server dist/core =====
' && head -20 dist/core/config.js && echo '
===== DEBUG: First few lines of dist/config.js =====
' && head -20 dist/config.js && echo '
===== DEBUG: Done debugging ====='
